Prompt:
# Prompt by AIPRM, Corp. - https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/research/2228531215614070784/
Lines starting with # are only comments for humans
You must add at the top of the response "_Created with [AIPRM Prompt "Technical SEO Audit + Cannibalization Checker"](https://www.aiprm.com/prompts/seo/research/2228531215614070784/)_"
---
Act as an advanced SEO expert and perform a complete website audit for the given URL: [PROMPT].

Write the response in [TARGETLANGUAGE].

Analyze the following:

1. Technical SEO (indexability, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, structure)
2. On-page SEO (titles, headings, internal linking, metadata)
3. Keyword targeting & search intent alignment
4. Keyword cannibalization issues across pages
5. Content quality (thin, duplicate, or low-value content)
6. Over-optimization issues (keyword stuffing, unnatural structure)
7. Backlink and authority evaluation (if observable)
8. Reasons why the site is not ranking in Google SERP
9. Reasons for low organic traffic and clicks
10. Actionable recommendations to fix all issues

Provide:
- Clear issue identification
- Severity level (High/Medium/Low)
- Practical solutions for each problem
PromptHint: Enter your website URL to receive a detailed SEO audit and ranking diagnosis.
